title: Tab Friends
description: Never lose track of your friends on busy servers - Tab Friends brings them to the top of the player list with eye-catching visual highlights and customizable colors!
body:
# Tab Friends

A client-side mod for Minecraft that allows you to add players to a friends list. Friends are displayed first in the server player list.

## Features

- Adding players to friends list via command
- Automatic sorting of player list: friends are always displayed first
- **Visual highlighting of friends:**
  - Colored background in player list
  - Customizable color and transparency through GUI
- Saving friends list between sessions
- Simple friends list management
- **Integration with Mod Menu** for convenient configuration through the game interface

## Commands

All commands start with `/tabfriend`:

- `/tabfriend add <player>` - add a player to the friends list
- `/tabfriend remove <player>` - remove a player from the friends list
- `/tabfriend list` - show the list of all added friends
- `/tabfriend clear` - clear the entire friends list
- `/tabfriend` - show command help

## Visual Display Configuration

The background color for friends can be configured through **Mod Menu**:

1. Install the [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) mod (optional but recommended)
2. In the game main menu, open "Mods"
3. Find "Tab Friends" in the list and click the settings icon
4. Available settings:
   - **Red, Green, Blue** - color components (0-255)
   - **Transparency** - background transparency level (0 = fully transparent, 255 = fully opaque)
   - **Color Preview** - ARGB color palette for quick selection

Default: dark green color with 50% transparency (`0x80008800`)

Settings are automatically saved to the `config/tab-friends-config.json` file
